pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 57-58, export_result.sh line 30, task.json description
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 19, 51; verifier.py line 21. Custom SKU for real product DJI Mini 3 Pro (official SKU: CP.MA.00000485.01 or CP.MA.00000492.01, price ~$759 USD)

Code analysis: seed_products.php line 51, setup_task.sh lines 20, 52; verifier.py line 22. Custom SKU for real product Anker PowerCore 26800mAh (official SKU: A1374H11-2 or B1376H11-1, price ~$64.95-$65.99 USD). Price discrepancy in code: $65.99 in seed_products.php vs $59.99 in setup_task.sh
Code analysis: task.json line 5 (50% discount), verifier.py lines 69-70 (validates 0.49-0.51 range)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a promotion named 'Drone Power Bundle' with a 50% discount on the Anker PowerCore 26800 (SKU: ANKER-PC26800) when the DJI Mini 3 Pro (SKU: DJI-MINI3) is in the cart. All metadata values are correctly specified and correspond to custom SKUs for real products (DJI Mini 3 Pro and Anker PowerCore 26800mAh). The task uses synthetic data with custom SKUs that do not match official manufacturer SKUs. The promotion is created on demand during task setup.
